dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The Plum Blossom Sword Saint. Chung Myung. His name echoed through the martial world like a legend, a terrifying whisper of a man who stood alone against the forces of darkness.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: At the peak of the Demonic Cult's stronghold, amidst the corpses of countless cultivators, he made his final stand.

dialogue.speaker: CHUNG MYUNG
dialogue.line: Heavenly Demon! You arrogant bastard! You think you can just... destroy the world and get away with it?

dialogue.speaker: CHUNG MYUNG
dialogue.line: Not while I still draw breath! Even if it costs me everything, I'll drag you to hell with me!

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CRACKLE! BOOM! SHATTER!

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: THUD!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: And then... nothing. Only the silence of a world saved, and a hero lost.

dialogue.speaker: CHUNG MYUNG
dialogue.line: Ugh... my head...

dialogue.speaker: CHUNG MYUNG
dialogue.line: (thought) What is this? This isn't... the afterlife. It's too bright. And... why does my body feel so small? So weak?

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: GROAN

dialogue.speaker: JUNIOR DISCIPLE
dialogue.line: Oh! Elder! He's awake! The child is awake!

dialogue.speaker: CHUNG MYUNG
dialogue.line: (thought) Child? Who is he talking about? And... these robes. That symbol... Plum Blossom? Mount Hua?

dialogue.speaker: ELDER
dialogue.line: Careful, young one. You've been unconscious for a day. Are you feeling alright?

dialogue.speaker: CHUNG MYUNG
dialogue.line: (thought) An elder of Mount Hua? But... this isn't my Mount Hua. This building... it's falling apart. The robes are faded. And these 'disciples'... they look like they've never seen a proper sword in their lives!

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CREAK (of the old wooden floor)

dialogue.speaker: CHUNG MYUNG
dialogue.line: What year is it?

dialogue.speaker: ELDER
dialogue.line: The year of the Heavenly Dragon, young one. The 135th year of the Imperial Calendar.

dialogue.speaker: CHUNG MYUNG
dialogue.line: (thought) The 135th year...? That's... hundreds of years! Centuries have passed! I died fighting the Heavenly Demon, and now... I'm back? As a child? In this... this pathetic excuse for Mount Hua?!

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: GASP

dialogue.speaker: CHUNG MYUNG
dialogue.line: (thought) My Mount Hua... the magnificent sect that once rivaled Shaolin and Wudang... it's become this? A dilapidated temple with a handful of scrawny disciples? This is a joke! A cruel, twisted joke!

dialogue.speaker: ELDER
dialogue.line: Are you alright, child? You look pale.

dialogue.speaker: CHUNG MYUNG
dialogue.line: (thought) Pale? I'm furious! I, the Plum Blossom Sword Saint, who single-handedly saved the world, reincarnated into this mess? This isn't just a decline, it's a complete collapse! What happened to all my disciples? My grand-disciples? The Plum Blossom Sword technique? Is it all gone?

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CLENCH (a small fist)

dialogue.speaker: CHUNG MYUNG
dialogue.line: (thought) No. This won't do. Not at all. Mount Hua is my home. It *will* rise again. Even if I have to drag every single one of these lazy, ignorant bastards by their ears and kick them into shape myself.

dialogue.speaker: CHUNG MYUNG
dialogue.line: (thought) Heavenly Demon, you may have taken my life, but you won't take my sect's legacy. Just you wait, Mount Hua. Your Plum Blossom is back. And this time, I'm going to make sure you bloom brighter than ever before!

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: DETERMINED SIGH

summary: The legendary Plum Blossom Sword Saint, Chung Myung, dies after defeating the Heavenly Demon. He awakens centuries later as a child, only to find his beloved Mount Hua Sect in a state of utter ruin, sparking his determination to restore it to its former glory.
